description: Bear in giraffe onesie plush — cleaning and refresh, restuffing, and sewing and fabric repair.
itemDetails:
This bear in a giraffe onesie is a novelty costume plush style common in gift shops and seasonal retail from the 2000s onward. The design combines a standard teddy body with character-costume clothing cues, which is typical of modern mixed-animal plush concepts.

Materials are usually polyester plush, stitched applique facial details, and lightweight fiber fill with embroidered accents on the onesie. Secondary-market pricing is generally modest unless the item can be matched to a specific licensed range or a known plush maker via sewn labels.
